input.background: A study looked at the number of cavity-free children per 100 in 16 North American cities BEFORE and AFTER public water fluoridation projects. Table 11.2 lists the data.
input.data:
\begin{table}
\captionsetup{labelformat=empty}
\caption{Table 11.2 Cavity-free children per 100 in 16 North American cities before and after public water fluoridation projects.}
\begin{tabular}{|l|l|}
\hline AFTER & BEFORE \\
\hline 49.2 & 18.2 \\
\hline 30.0 & 21.9 \\
\hline 16.0 & 5.2 \\
\hline 47.8 & 20.4 \\
\hline 3.4 & 2.8 \\
\hline 16.8 & 21.0 \\
\hline 10.7 & 11.3 \\
\hline 5.7 & 6.1 \\
\hline 23.0 & 25.0 \\
\hline 17.0 & 13.0 \\
\hline 79.0 & 76.0 \\
\hline 66.0 & 59.0 \\
\hline 46.8 & 25.6 \\
\hline 84.9 & 50.4 \\
\hline 65.2 & 41.2 \\
\hline 52.0 & 21.0 \\
\hline
\end{tabular}
\end{table}
input.question: Calculate DELTA values for each city. Then construct a stemplot of these differences. Interpret your plot.

output.answer:
(a) DELTA values:

\begin{tabular}{|l|l|l|}
\hline AFTER & BEFORE & DELTA \
\hline 49.2 & 18.2 & 31.0 \
\hline 30.0 & 21.9 & 8.1 \
\hline 16.0 & 5.2 & 10.8 \
\hline 47.8 & 20.4 & 27.4 \
\hline 3.4 & 2.8 & 0.6 \
\hline 16.8 & 21.0 & -4.2 \
\hline 10.7 & 11.3 & -0.6 \
\hline 5.7 & 6.1 & -0.4 \
\hline 23.0 & 25.0 & -2.0 \
\hline 17.0 & 13.0 & 4.0 \
\hline 79.0 & 76.0 & 3.0 \
\hline 66.0 & 59.0 & 7.0 \
\hline 46.8 & 25.6 & 21.2 \
\hline 84.9 & 50.4 & 34.5 \
\hline 65.2 & 41.2 & 24.0 \
\hline 52.0 & 21.0 & 31.0 \
\hline
\end{tabular}

Stemplot of DELTA values:
```
-0|0024
    0|034\underline{78}
    1|0
    2|147
    3|114
X10 (change in cavity-free rate per 100 children)
```

Interpretation:
- Data spread from -4 to 34.
- The median is about 7.5 (taken from the stemplot).
- The shape of the distribution is difficult to assess because of the small sample size. There are no prominent outliers.

AFTER.description: Number of cavity-free children per 100 in 16 North American cities AFTER public water fluoridation projects.

BEFORE.description: Number of cavity-free children per 100 in 16 North American cities BEFORE public water fluoridation projects.

DELTA.description: Difference in the number of cavity-free children per 100 for each city calculated as AFTER minus BEFORE.
